description: Defines custom exception classes for the application.

classes.name: MQIError
classes.docstring: Base exception class for all MQI application errors.

classes.name: GpuResourceError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for GPU resource management errors.

classes.name: WorkflowError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for workflow execution errors.

classes.name: ProcessingError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for case processing errors.

classes.name: FileUploadError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for file upload errors.

classes.name: ValidationError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for input validation errors.

classes.name: RetryableError
classes.docstring: Exception raised for errors that can be safely retried.

classes.name: CircuitBreakerOpenError
classes.docstring: Exception raised when the circuit breaker is open.
